name: h3c-agent-desktop
description: H3C Agent desktop shell (Electron + Python sidecar)

scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.yml
